author: potuz
content: Left a comment in the Builder API one, but it's hard to coordinate when there's three different related PRs: I think all mentions of proxies should be removed from the spec.

author: jvranek
content: https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/165#discussion_r3631813390 replied here, it's possible to strip the proxy references without limiting functionality. will update the 3 PRs to match today

author: potuz
content: Ah perfect that is exactly what I meant by sending multiple signed requests to the relay

author: potuz
content: that way the proxy can validate whatever it wants without it ever affecting the main pbs auction
